description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.9.3 Docker image, caches the node_modules/ directory, and sets the variable DISABLE_NOTIFIER to 'true'. Define a single stage named deploy and a job called pages that runs in this stage. The job runs the before_script command npm install, then executes ./node_modules/gulp/bin/gulp.js prep, creates the directory public/.well-known/acme-challenge/, moves all files from dist/ into public/, and moves the specific challenge file .well-known/acme-challenge/mWzN6xprVBDTWT7nrHN0TpHwTySjNQ25fOkMGGto5cw into public/.well-known/acme-challenge/ with the same name. It publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact and is configured to run only on the master branch.
